1.title: Frontend Web Development
1.description: Build modern, responsive, and fast websites using React, Next.js, TailwindCSS, and other cutting-edge frontend technologies.

2.title: Backend Development / Server Setup
2.description: Design and implement robust backend APIs using Node.js, Express, MongoDB, MySQL, and secure server configurations.

3.title: Fullstack Project Creation
3.description: End-to-end project development from frontend UI to backend database and deployment, ensuring high performance and scalability.

4.title: Role-Based Dashboard
4.description: Create dashboards with authentication and role-based access control for admin, instructors, and users.

5.title: MERN Stack Development
5.description: Expertise in MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js stack to build dynamic, scalable web applications.

6.title: WordPress Development & Customization
6.description: Create WordPress websites, customize themes, and develop custom themes/plugins as per client requirements.

7.title: SEO Optimization
7.description: Improve search engine rankings by implementing on-page SEO, meta tags, sitemaps, and performance optimization.

8.title: Authentication & Security
8.description: Implement secure login, registration, JWT authentication, and data protection measures for your websites.
